Name: Avocado Orchard Trees
Description: Orchard tree stock aligned with South Africa's avocado production regions and long-cycle subtropical plantings.

Sources.title: SAAGA Avocado Production Stats & Regions
Sources.note: The page lists South African avocado production regions including Limpopo, Mpumalanga, KwaZulu-Natal, and the Western Cape.

Name: Citrus Orchard Plants
Description: Citrus planting stock suited to commercial orchard systems backed by South African grower-industry intelligence and market access support.

Sources.title: CGA Industry Statistics 2025
Sources.note: CGA publishes citrus industry statistics and supports citrus growers with market access, research, and industry intelligence.

Name: Table Grape Vines
Description: Table grape vine stock aligned with South Africa's five major growing regions and export-focused production calendar.

Sources.title: SATI Regions
Sources.note: SATI describes five major table grape growing regions, including the Northern Provinces, Orange River, Olifants River, Berg River, and Hex River areas.

Name: Seed Potatoes
Description: Seed potato stock and planting material linked to regional grower activity across the Western, Southern, Eastern Free State, Marble Hall, and KwaZulu-Natal potato belts.

Sources.title: Potatoes SA Regional Search Results
Sources.note: The site surfaces regional seed potato and table potato grower meetings in Douglas, Elandsbaai, Marble Hall, Weenen, and the Eastern Free State.

Name: Maize Seed Stock
Description: Summer-grain seed stock for maize-focused operations supported by Grain SA's national producer network and commodity services.

Sources.title: Grain SA Contact and Commodity Hub
Sources.note: Grain SA provides national producer support, commodity information, and farmer-development services for the grain sector.
